# /impact

> Surface existing reporting artefacts (datasets / dataflows / reports / dashboards / apps / RLS roles / refresh schedules) the proposed feature will touch.

## Usage

```
/impact [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Execution flow

1. Read spec; extract referenced artefact patterns.
2. Cross-reference brownfield inventory + sibling features.
3. Emit `impact.md` with:
   - **Datasets touched** with refresh-time impact estimate
   - **RLS role collisions** (does this feature need a new role not currently defined?)
   - **Dataflow lineage changes** (new upstream source; broken downstream consumers)
   - **Workspace capacity impact** (does dataset growth need a capacity upgrade?)
   - **Subscription / app impact** (do existing app users now see this report?)
4. No gate transitions.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/reporting/features/{f}/impact.md`
